summary: Completed e2e testing of Reseller POS module. All core features working correctly - customer search/selection, category/product selection, product configuration with dynamic config fields, measurement page with guard. Fixed bcrypt compatibility issue that was blocking admin login.
critical_code_review_comments: bcrypt 5.0.0 was incompatible with passlib 1.7.4 - downgraded to bcrypt 4.0.1 to fix auth login
seed_data_creation: None - using existing test customer 'Rahul Sharma'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Reseller POS features tested and working: 1) Reseller Dashboard at /reseller/dashboard with customer search/selection, 2) Customize page at /reseller/customize with category and product selection, 3) Product Configure page at /reseller/customize/configure with dynamic config fields (Fabric, Lining, Button) based on product.config_fields, 4) Measurement page at /reseller/measurement with guard against direct access, 5) Admin Product Categories page at /admin/products with category/product/config field management. Backend API /api/products/categories returns products with config_fields correctly.

reseller_dashboard.details: Customer search works, dropdown shows customers from API, selecting customer updates UI to show 'Creating order for [name]', navigation buttons (Customize, Measurement, Styling, Orders) are disabled until customer selected

customize_page.details: Shows 4 categories (Suits & Jackets - 5 products, Shirts - 2 products, Denim Wear - 2 products, Shoes - 0 products), clicking category shows products, clicking product navigates to configure page

product_configure_page.details: Displays config fields dynamically based on product.config_fields (e.g., Suits has Fabric, Lining, Button). Each field has code input and Camera/Upload buttons. 'Next: Measurement' button is correctly disabled until all required fields have both code AND image

measurement_page.details: Guard works - direct access shows 'No product selected' with 'Go to Dashboard' button. Page displays measurement fields based on product type

admin_product_categories.details: Shows all categories with products and config field counts. Has Add Category, Add Product, Add Field buttons. Save All Changes button present. Categories can be expanded to show products, products can be expanded to show config fields

api_products_categories.details: GET /api/products/categories returns categories with products and config_fields. Each product has config_fields array with id, name, type, required properties

navigation_flow.details: Full flow works: Dashboard → select customer → Customize → select category → select product → Configure → fill fields → Measurement. State (customer, category, product, configuration) is passed correctly between pages

bcrypt_compatibility.issue: bcrypt 5.0.0 incompatible with passlib 1.7.4 causing 500 error on /api/auth/admin/login
bcrypt_compatibility.fix: Downgraded bcrypt to 4.0.1 via pip install bcrypt==4.0.1
